vocab.meaning: khơi dậy ngọn lửa sáng tạo
vocab.example: Messing around with watercolors as a child really helped ignite a spark of creativity in me.

vocab.meaning: dấn thân vào những cuộc phiêu lưu giả tưởng
vocab.example: My siblings and I used to embark on make-believe adventures in the backyard, pretending the garden was a dense jungle.

vocab.meaning: thử thách giới hạn thể chất của bản thân
vocab.example: Competitive sports like football allowed me to test my physical limits and build endurance from a young age.

vocab.meaning: tìm kiếm sự an yên/khỏa lấp nỗi buồn trong...
vocab.example: As an introverted child, I would often seek solace in the quiet corners of the school library.

vocab.meaning: rèn luyện/mài giũa các kỹ năng tư duy
vocab.example: I was obsessed with strategy board games, which significantly helped me hone my cognitive skills and logical thinking.
I’m still reaping the benefits of learning a musical instrument during my formative years.
The playground was the perfect place to unleash my boundless energy after a long day of sitting in class.

vocab.meaning: thỏa mãn niềm khao khát kiến thức
vocab.example: Reading encyclopedias was my way to quench a thirst for knowledge about the natural world.

vocab.meaning: thắt chặt các mối quan hệ xã hội
vocab.example: Group activities like camping trips were instrumental in helping us strengthen social bonds with our peers.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng một tài năng bẩm sinh
vocab.example: My parents enrolled me in dance classes to nurture an innate talent for rhythm and movement.
